reasoning: At 4x the bottle reads well — rounded cork, blue mana liquid, pixel-art glass body give it genuine toy charm and thematic personality. The blue pops on both dark and light backgrounds and the cork/stopper adds character. However the 1x panel is the critical failure point: the sprites shrink to ~8-10px and the bottle silhouette becomes a vague smudge — a player glancing at the HUD cannot confidently read 'potion bottle' without prior knowledge. On the light background the white/clear glass body also loses contrast, merging with the cream bg and reducing pop. The design has the right charm vocabulary (round, soft, friendly) but the multi-element composition (glass body + liquid fill + cork + highlight) does not survive aggressive downscaling. Passes charm, marginal on silhouette clarity at 1x.
